System Diagnostics & Data Browser

Comprehensive system information and data inspection tool

Updated Thu Oct 23, 6:10am

Commission Summary Reports

Note: These reports query all commission data and may be slow on large installations. Select which summaries to display below.

user.lv_branch.name{{ user.lv_branch.name }}
user.lv_loanofficer.id{{ user.lv_loanofficer.id }}
user.lv_loanofficer.name{{ user.lv_loanofficer.name }}

{% fetchxml commissionDataByPeriod %} {% endfetchxml %} {% comment %} Get period names separately to avoid groupby issues {% endcomment %} {% fetchxml periodNames %} {% endfetchxml %}
{% assign total_count = 0 %} {% assign total_amount = 0 %} {% for item in commissionDataByPeriod.results.entities %} {% comment %} Find matching period name {% endcomment %} {% assign period_name = "Unknown" %} {% for period in periodNames.results.entities %} {% if period.lv_periodno == item.period %} {% assign period_name = period.lv_name %} {% break %} {% endif %} {% endfor %} {% assign total_count = total_count | plus: item.count %} {% assign total_amount = total_amount | plus: item.total_amount %} {% endfor %}
Period Number Period Name Count Total Amount
{{ item.period }} {{ period_name }} {{ item.count }} {{ item.total_amount }}
Total {{ total_count }} {{ total_amount }}
{% comment %} First get all periods {% endcomment %} {% fetchxml allPeriods %} {% endfetchxml %}
{% assign loop_total_count = 0 %} {% assign loop_total_amount = 0.0 %} {% comment %} Loop through each period and query commissions {% endcomment %} {% for period in allPeriods.results.entities %} {% assign currentPeriodNo = period.lv_periodno %} {% assign currentPeriodName = period.lv_name %} {% comment %} Query commissions for this specific period {% endcomment %} {% fetchxml periodCommissions %} {% endfetchxml %} {% comment %} Manual counting and summing {% endcomment %} {% assign period_count = 0 %} {% assign period_amount = 0.0 %} {% for commission in periodCommissions.results.entities %} {% assign period_count = period_count | plus: 1 %} {% assign period_amount = period_amount | plus: commission.lv_amount %} {% endfor %} {% comment %} Only show rows with data {% endcomment %} {% if period_count > 0 %} {% assign loop_total_count = loop_total_count | plus: period_count %} {% assign loop_total_amount = loop_total_amount | plus: period_amount %} {% endif %} {% endfor %}
Period Number Period Name Count Total Amount
{{ currentPeriodNo }} {{ currentPeriodName }} {{ period_count }} {{ period_amount }}
Total {{ loop_total_count }} {{ loop_total_amount }}

Method: Primitive looping approach

Periods processed: {{ allPeriods.results.entities.size }}

Note: This method should work even when aggregate FetchXML fails, as it uses simple filtering on lv_periodno.

{% fetchxml commissionDataByBranch %} {% endfetchxml %}
{% assign total_count = 0 %} {% assign total_amount = 0.0 %} {% assign current_period = "" %} {% assign current_period_name = "" %} {% assign period_count = 0 %} {% assign period_amount = 0.0 %} {% assign period_index = 0 %} {% for item in commissionDataByBranch.results.entities %} {% if current_period != item.period and forloop.index > 1 %} {% assign period_count = 0 %} {% assign period_amount = 0.0 %} {% assign period_index = period_index | plus: 1 %} {% endif %} {% assign current_period = item.period %} {% assign current_period_name = item.period_name %} {% assign period_count = period_count | plus: item.count %} {% assign period_amount = period_amount | plus: item.total_amount %} {% assign total_count = total_count | plus: item.count %} {% assign total_amount = total_amount | plus: item.total_amount %} {% endfor %} {% if commissionDataByBranch.results.entities.size > 0 %} {% endif %}
Period Period Name Branch Branch Name Count Total Amount
Period {{ current_period }} - {{ current_period_name }} {{ period_count }} {{ period_amount }}
{{ item.period }} {{ item.period_name }} {{ item.branch }} {{ item.branch_name }} {{ item.count }} {{ item.total_amount }}
Period {{ current_period }} - {{ current_period_name }} {{ period_count }} {{ period_amount }}
Total {{ total_count }} {{ total_amount }}
{% fetchxml commissionByPeriod %} {% endfetchxml %} {% fetchxml commissionByBranch %} {% endfetchxml %} {% fetchxml commissionByLoanOfficer %} {% endfetchxml %}
{% assign total_count = 0 %} {% assign total_amount = 0.0 %} {% for period_item in commissionByPeriod.results.entities %} {% assign period = period_item.period %} {% assign period_name = period_item.period_name %} {% assign period_count = period_item.count %} {% assign period_amount = period_item.total_amount %} {% assign total_count = total_count | plus: period_count %} {% assign total_amount = total_amount | plus: period_amount %} {% for branch_item in commissionByBranch.results.entities %} {% if branch_item.period == period %} {% assign branch = branch_item.branch %} {% assign branch_name = branch_item.branch_name %} {% for officer_item in commissionByLoanOfficer.results.entities %} {% if officer_item.period == period and officer_item.branch == branch %} {% endif %} {% endfor %} {% endif %} {% endfor %} {% endfor %}
Period Period Name Branch/Loan Officer Count Total Amount

Total {{ total_count }} {{ total_amount }}

{% assign recordCount = 0 %} {% for row in allLoanBasedCommissions.results.entities %} {% assign recordCount = recordCount | plus: 1 %} {% if recordCount <= 20 %} {% endif %} {% endfor %}
Entry No Amount Borrower Name LO Name LO Code Branch Code Period No Type
{{ row.lv_entryno }} {{ row.lv_amount | format: 'C' }} {{ row.lv_xborrowername }} {{ row.lv_xloanofficername }} {{ row.lv_xloanofficercode }} {{ row.lv_xbranchcode }} {{ row.lv_periodno }} {{ row.lv_commissiontype }}
{% else %}

No commission records found for the latest period.

{% endif %} {% comment %} Reset the period to original value {% endcomment %} {% assign sqUISelPeriodNo = originalPeriod %}

powerpagecomponent.name: Diag
powerpagecomponent.searchcontent:
